narrative:
Brookville-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 988 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
